title: Toast Notification

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Toast Notification
description: Create a toast notification component that can be triggered by a button.
requirements
The toast notification should be displayed with a title and message.
The toast notification should be closable by clicking on the close button.
The toast notification should be hidden by default and shown only when triggered.

constraints: Use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for this challenge.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The toast notification should be triggered by a button with the class 'bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-700 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded'.

starterCode.javascript:
/* Starter JavaScript for Toast Notification challenge */

   console.log('Starter JavaScript for Toast Notification challenge');

gradingCriteria.description: Toast notification is displayed when the trigger button is clicked.
Toast notification is closable by clicking on the close button.
Toast notification is hidden by default and shown only when triggered.
